GL0.title: Level 0 Character
GL0.subtitle: Before the adventure begins
GL0.summary: PF2e supplies the four free ability boosts and ancestry HP + Constitution at level 0. This tab supplies the variant's missing proficiencies and optional apprentice benefits.
GL0.warning.class: This level-0 PC still has a Class item. Remove it from the native sheet; apprentice benefits do not use a full class item.
GL0.initial.title: Initial Proficiencies
GL0.initial.fixed: Trained automatically: Perception, Fortitude, Reflex, Will, unarmed attacks, and unarmored defense.
GL0.skills.hint: Choose 2 + Intelligence modifier skills. Background and apprentice skills are granted separately.
GL0.apprentice.title: Apprentice Option
GL0.apprentice.alchemistHint: Advanced alchemy level 1, one batch of infused reagents each day, and infused alchemical items only.
GL0.apprentice.monkHint: Grants the native PF2e Powerful Fist class feature.
GL0.apprentice.martialHint: Trained in light armor, all simple weapons, and the chosen martial weapon.
GL0.apprentice.spellcasterHint: Trained in the chosen tradition and gains exactly two fixed cantrips.
GL0.money.title: Starting Money
GL0.money.rule: A level-0 PC starts with 5 gp. Adventures through 1st level should distribute another 10 gp per PC.
GL0.money.confirm: Add 5 gp to {name}? This is additive and can be done once through this tab.
GL0.gameplay.title: Gameplay & Advancement
GL0.gameplay.rule: Combat is especially dangerous. For encounter building, the GM can treat this PC as level -1. For a short level-0 arc, consider advancing at 800 XP; for a longer arc, advance to Apprentice before 1st level.
GL0.error.martialWeapon: Choose one martial weapon for this apprentice.
GL0.error.cantrip: Drop a PF2e cantrip into this slot.
GL0.error.sync: Level 0 automation could not be updated: {message}
GL0.effect.name: Level 0 Proficiencies
GL0.effect.description: Provides the initial proficiencies and optional apprentice benefits from the Level 0 Characters variant rule.
GL0.spellcasting.name: Level 0 {tradition} Apprentice
GL0.powerfulFistMissing: The PF2e Powerful Fist class feature could not be found.
